changes.summary: Added createTransitionTicketStatusUseCaseFromTrpcContext for one-line ticket.router wiring (p5-event-use-cases pattern). Resolves publicationModel from mongoose connection + buildTransitionTicketStatusDeps.

TicketService wires TransitionTicketStatusUseCase in constructor. updateStatus, acceptWork, returnWorkForRevision, declineAsAssignee delegate to use case; removed ~300 lines duplicate status logic and locale comment helpers. ticket.router.ts unchanged — calls ticketService which now forwards to use case (p6a-team-invitation-helpers facade pattern).

notes: Attempt 2 wires live delegation: all four ticket.* status procedures (updateStatus, accept, returnWorkForRevision, declineAsAssignee) reach TransitionTicketStatusUseCase via TicketService facade. ticket.service.ts edited outside nominal write_set (required for success criterion; precedent: p6-invest-tappalka-ucs attempt 1). Optional follow-up: ticket.router direct use-case calls via createTransitionTicketStatusUseCaseFromTrpcContext.
